zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery de Blackwell於1465年出生在英國德比夏爾布萊克韋爾時，她的父親Richard de Blackwell35歲，母親Isabel de Lytton31歲。她與John Gyles IV結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1522年在英國德比夏爾維爾可斯沃斯享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery de Blackwell于1465年出生在英国德比夏爾布萊克韋爾时，她的父亲Richard de Blackwell35岁，母亲Isabel de Lytton31岁。她与John Gyles IV结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1522年在英国德比夏爾維爾可斯沃斯享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Blackwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Blackwell, for example in Cumbria, Derbyshire, County Durham, Warwickshire, Somerset, Devon, Sussex, and Worcestershire, named in Old English frp blæc ‘black, dark’ + wæll(a), well(a) ‘spring, stream’. Alternatively, it may be a topographic name for someone who lived by the ‘dark well or stream’, Middle English blak + wel(le).

variants.name: Barkell
meanings: English (Devon): perhaps a habitational name from an unidentified place, named with Old English balca ‘ridge’ + wiella ‘spring, stream’. Alternatively, it may be an irregular variant of the Devon habitational name Blackwell .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery de Blackwell was born in 1465, in Blackwell, Derbyshire, England, her father, Richard de Blackwell, was 35 and her mother, Isabel de Lytton, was 31. She married John Gyles IV. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1522, in Wirksworth, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery de Blackwell est née en 1465, à Blackwell, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Blackwell, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Lytton, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé John Gyles IV. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1522, à Wirksworth, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery de Blackwell 1465 in Blackwell, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Blackwell 35 und ihre Mutter Isabel de Lytton 31. Sie hat John Gyles IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1522 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Wirksworth, Derbyshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Blackwell è nata il nel 1465 nel Blackwell, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, Richard de Blackwell, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Isabel de Lytton, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato John Gyles IV. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1522, nel Wirksworth, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery de Blackwellが1465年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアブラックウエルで生まれた時，父Richard de Blackwellは35歳，母Isabel de Lyttonは31歳であった。John Gyles IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1522年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアウィルクスウオルスで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery de Blackwell(이)가 1465년 영국 더비실르 블랙웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Blackwell(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Lytton(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 John Gyles IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1522년 영국 더비실르 위르크스워스에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Blackwell nasceu em 1465, em Blackwell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Blackwell, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Lytton, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com John Gyles IV. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1522, em Wirksworth, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery de Blackwell родилась в 1465 г. в местности блэкквелл, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard de Blackwell было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Lytton, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Gyles IV. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1522 г. в местности вирксворт, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery de Blackwell nació en 1465, en Blackwell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Blackwell, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Isabel de Lytton, tenía 31 años. Se casó con John Gyles IV. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1522, en Wirksworth, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años.
